props.name: anchorName
props.description: A custom CSS anchor name shared by the anchor and target.

props.name: as
props.description: The element or component to render as the anchor.

props.name: render
props.description: Replaces the default anchor element or composes it with another component.

props.name: as
props.description: The element or component to render as the positioned target.

props.name: render
props.description: Replaces the default target element or composes it with another component.

props.name: placement
props.description: The target's logical placement relative to the anchor.

props.name: alignment
props.description: The target's alignment along the placement axis.

props.name: fallbackStrategy
props.description: Controls which CSS anchor-positioning fallbacks the browser may try when the target overflows.

props.name: gap
props.description: The space between the anchor and target. Numbers are interpreted as pixels.
